basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has officially announced the Attendant (Project Mode) Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Guwahati website. Candidates who meet the age criteria mentioned in the official notification and hold a High School qualification with at least 1 year of experience in Central Government or Autonomous Bodies under the Central Government, such as IITs, can submit their online applications on or before 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification PDF and apply online are shar

qualification.education_qualification: High School Pass with minimum 1-year experience in Central Govt. / Autonomous bodies under Central Govt. like IITs.
qualification.details: High School Pass with minimum 1-year experience in Central Govt. / Autonomous bodies under Central Govt. like IITs.

salary_details.details: Rs. 15000 Per Month Rs.15000/- + 20% HRA + Medical Facility

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Attendant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Guwahati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Guwahati Attendant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: High School Pass with minimum 1-year experience in Central Govt. / Autonomous bodies under Central Govt. like IITs.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 15000 Per Month Rs.15000/- + 20% HRA + Medical Facility

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Attendant (Project Mode) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Attendant (Project Mode) post at IIT Guwahati is 20th July 2026. Ensure you complete the application process well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Attendant (Project Mode) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Attendant (Project Mode) position at IIT Guwahati. These positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must have passed High School and possess a minimum of 1 year of experience working in Central Government or autonomous bodies under the Central Government, such as IITs.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Attendant (Project Mode) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000. Additionally, they are entitled to 20% HRA and medical facilities as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Attendant (Project Mode) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Attendant (Project Mode) post at IIT Guwahati involves two main stages: shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Attendant (Project Mode) position at IIT Guwahati is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the IIT Guwahati Attendant (Project Mode) Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the link provided in the 'Important Links' section or by visiting the official website of IIT Guwahati. Ensure all details are accurate before submission.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.
